_meta.description: Aiko router test suite v2: 60 prompts covering diverse real-world workflows — home, office, shopping, cooking, travel, coding, creative, and personal tasks
_meta.notes: Agentic prompts span coding, office, home, shopping, travel, creative, and personal domains. Chat and chat+search prompts are domain-agnostic to test regression.

prompts.prompt: find the cheapest USB-C hub on Amazon with at least 4 ports and HDMI, compare the top 3, and save a recommendation note
look up this week's grocery flyers for Metro and Save-On-Foods, find the best deals on chicken and vegetables, and make a shopping list
search for the cheapest flight from Vancouver to Tokyo in October, compare at least 3 options, note layovers and total travel time, and save the best pick
find a highly rated slow cooker beef stew recipe, scale it to 6 servings, make a grocery list, and save the full plan as a note
research the best budget mechanical keyboards under $80, compare switches and build quality across the top 5, and write a buying guide
draft a monthly budget spreadsheet outline for a single person living in Vancouver, include rent, food, transit, and savings targets, then save it
look up how to fix a leaking bathroom faucet, find the right replacement parts for a standard ball faucet, list the tools needed, and write step-by-step repair notes
search for the best rated cordless drills under $120, compare battery life and torque across 4 models, check current prices, and recommend one
plan a 3-day hiking trip to Garibaldi Provincial Park, research trail conditions, pack list, nearest parking, and campsite availability, then write a full trip plan
research how to start composting at home in a small apartment, find the best compact bin options under $50, compare 3, and save a getting-started guide
draft a professional resignation letter for a software developer leaving after 3 years, keep it warm and grateful, save it as a note
find the current best noise-cancelling headphones under $200, compare ANC quality and battery life across 4 models, check if any are on sale, and save a recommendation
research the visa requirements for a Canadian citizen visiting Japan for 2 weeks, find the application process, list required documents, and save a checklist
look up how to propagate a monstera plant from a cutting, find the best soil mix and pot size, write step-by-step care notes, and save them
draft a weekly meal plan for one person trying to eat under $60 a week, include 5 dinners and 5 lunches, generate a combined grocery list, and save it
research how to negotiate a raise, find current software developer salary ranges in Vancouver, draft talking points for the conversation, and save them as notes
find the best protein powder for muscle gain under $60 on iHerb or Amazon, compare ingredients and serving cost across 4 options, and save a recommendation
research small chest freezers under $300, compare capacity and energy efficiency across 5 models, check current prices at Canadian Tire and Best Buy, and recommend one
plan a dinner party menu for 6 people including a vegetarian option, find recipes for each course, generate a full shopping list, and estimate total cost
research how to set up a basic home network with a mesh WiFi system, compare 3 mesh systems under $250, check current deals, and write a setup guide
find the cheapest way to ship a 5kg package from Vancouver to Toronto, compare Canada Post, Purolator, and FedEx, and save the best option with tracking details
research the best standing desk converters under $150, compare stability and height range across 4 models, check Canadian availability, and recommend one
look up how to winterize a car in BC, find the best all-season tire deals for a compact sedan, list a maintenance checklist, and save everything as a note
draft a performance review self-assessment for a mid-level software engineer, highlight key achievements and growth areas, and save it as a document
research the best air purifiers for a 400 sq ft apartment under $200, compare HEPA filter quality and noise level across 4 models, and write a recommendation
find a reliable recipe for homemade sourdough bread, list the equipment needed, create a 7-day starter schedule, and save the full guide
research remote work tax deductions available in Canada for 2024, find CRA guidelines, calculate an example deduction for a home office, and save a summary
plan a 5-day road trip from Vancouver to Banff, research stops, accommodation options under $120/night, fuel cost estimate, and save a full itinerary
research how to build a simple raised garden bed, find the cheapest lumber prices locally, list tools and soil needed, estimate total cost, and save a build plan
find the best project management tools for a solo developer, compare Notion, Obsidian, and Linear on features and price, and write a decision summary
research the cheapest internet plans available in Vancouver right now, compare Shaw, Telus, and any indie ISPs on speed and price, and recommend the best value
look up how to soundproof a home office on a budget, find the cheapest effective materials, estimate cost for a 10x10 room, and save an implementation plan
draft a cold email to a potential freelance client for AI consulting services, research the target company first, personalize the pitch, and save the final draft
find a 7-day Japan itinerary for a first-time visitor, research must-see spots in Tokyo and Kyoto, estimate daily budget, find accommodation options, and save the plan
research how to reduce a monthly electricity bill in a BC apartment, find BC Hydro tips and rebate programs, calculate potential savings, and save an action plan
find the best 4K monitors under $400 for a developer, compare color accuracy, refresh rate, and port selection across 5 models, check Canadian prices, and recommend one
research how to set up a personal VPN server on a VPS, compare DigitalOcean and Vultr on price and latency from Vancouver, find a setup guide, and save implementation notes
plan a low-waste grocery run for the week, find what produce is in season in BC right now, match it to 5 simple recipes, generate a shopping list, and save it
research how to file taxes as a Canadian freelancer for the first time, find CRA guides for self-employment income, list required forms, and save a step-by-step checklist
find the best ergonomic office chairs under $300 in Canada, compare lumbar support and seat depth across 5 models, check current stock at local stores, and recommend one
what do you think is the hardest part about building a consistent grocery budget
explain the difference between a debit card and a credit card like I'm 12

why do plants need sunlight to survive
